column10: No URL parsing errors currently. Adding tests for varied formats to prevent regression. Target: 0 existing failures, ensure new tests pass.

fixed: extractUid falsely extracted 6-digit hex substring (027785) from vd_source query param as UID. Added video-page URL rejection check before free-text fallback. Added 13 new test cases for varied URL formats.

Enhanced PowerShell link classification: better UID pattern matching (uid/mid labels, 4+ digit UIDs), b23.tv short link detection, collection link detection. Updated example docs with all supported formats (with/without https://, query params, 16-digit UIDs). Tests: 1523/1524 pass.
